# Prohor Next.js Starter Kit

A high-performance, developer-ready Next.js starter kit pre-configured with Supabase auth/database, Tailwind CSS styling, Biome formatting, and GSAP motion frameworks.

## Project Structure

- `/src/app`: App Router routes.
  - `(landing)/`: Landing/marketing routes.
  - `(auth)/`: Authentication routes (login, etc.).
- `/src/components`: React components.
  - `ui/`: Standard shadcn UI primitives.
  - `shared/`: Shared components (Theme Provider, Toggler, etc.).
  - `auth/`: Login/signup component pages.
- `/src/lib`: core utility libraries (supabase client, icons config, seo details).
- `/src/types`: type definitions centralized in `index.ts`.

## Tech Stack & Conventions

- **Framework**: Next.js 15+ (App Router, React Server Components)
- **Database / Auth**: Supabase SSR client integration
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Code Standards**: Biome (formatting & linting, TypeScript strict mode)
- **Animations**: GSAP
- **Package Manager**: Bun (`bun` and `bunx` exclusively)
